sentence: 这款电视最近降价了不少。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn diànshì zuìjìn jiàngjià le bùshǎo.
english: This TV has dropped quite a bit in price recently.

sentence: 这份报告写得很简洁，一看就懂。
pinyin: Zhè fèn bàogào xiě de hěn jiǎnjié, yī kàn jiù dǒng.
english: This report is written very concisely — you understand it at a glance.

sentence: 今天报纸上的社论写得很有道理。
pinyin: Jīntiān bàozhǐ shang de shèlùn xiě de hěn yǒu dàolǐ.
english: The editorial in today's newspaper makes a lot of sense.

sentence: 他仪表整洁，给面试官留下了好印象。
pinyin: Tā yí biǎo zhěngjié, gěi miànshìguān liú xià le hǎo yìnxiàng.
english: His neat appearance made a good impression on the interviewer.

meaning: 1. to underline; 2. bottom line; 3. base line (in sports); 4. baseline
sentence: 价格再低我也有底线，不能白干。
pinyin: Jiàgé zài dī wǒ yě yǒu dǐxiàn, bù néng báigàn.
english: No matter how low the price goes, I have a bottom line — I can't work for nothing.

meaning: 1. pattern; 2. way of doing sth; 3. trick; 4. (sports) fancy-style (as
sentence: 他又在玩什么新花样？
pinyin: Tā yòu zài wán shénme xīn huāyàng?
english: What new tricks is he up to now?

meaning: 1. along the line (e.g. railway); 2. the region near the line
sentence: 高铁沿线开了很多新的商业区。
pinyin: Gāo tiě yán xiàn kāi le hěn duō xīn de shāng yè qū.
english: Many new commercial districts have opened along the high-speed rail line.

meaning: 1. to put effort into sth; 2. to try really hard
sentence: 他着力改善了团队的沟通方式。
pinyin: Tā zhuólì gǎishànle tuánduì de gōutōng fāngshì.
english: He put real effort into improving the way the team communicates.

meaning: 1. (economics) to reduce; 2. to curtail; 3. to cut back; 4. to tighten
sentence: 公司今年开始紧缩开支，减少了不少项目。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián kāishǐ jǐnsuō kāizhī, jiǎnshǎo le bù shǎo xiàngmù.
english: The company started cutting back on expenses this year and reduced quite a few projects.

meaning: 1. places of historic interest; 2. historical sites; 3. CL:個|个[gè]
sentence: 西安有很多著名的古迹。
pinyin: Xī'ān yǒu hěn duō zhùmíng de gǔjì.
english: Xi'an has many famous historical sites.

sentence: 过年时家家户户贴年画。
pinyin: Guònián shí jiājiā hùhù tiē niánhuà.
english: Every household puts up New Year pictures during the Spring Festival.

meaning: to go and visit in an official capacity or for investigation
sentence: 市长出访期间由副市长主持工作。
pinyin: Shì zhǎng chū fǎng qī jiān yóu fù shì zhǎng zhǔ chí gōng zuò.
english: While the mayor is away on an official visit, the deputy mayor takes charge.

sentence: 银河系是我们所在的星系。
pinyin: Yínhé xì shì wǒmen suǒ zài de xīngxì.
english: The Milky Way is the galaxy we live in.

sentence: 铁在潮湿的环境中容易氧化。
pinyin: Tiě zài cháoshī de huánjìng zhōng róngyì yǎnghuà.
english: Iron oxidizes easily in a damp environment.

sentence: 他把老师的建议内化成了自己的习惯。
pinyin: Tā bǎ lǎoshī de jiànyì nèihuà chéngle zìjǐ de xíguàn.
english: He internalized his teacher's advice into his own habits.

sentence: 这位数学家年轻时就解出了难题。
pinyin: Zhè wèi shùxuéjiā niánqīng shí jiù jiě chūle nántí.
english: This mathematician solved the difficult problem at a young age.

sentence: 手机上的传感器能检测到温度变化。
pinyin: Shǒujī shàng de chuángǎnqì néng jiǎncè dào wēndù biànhuà.
english: The sensor on the phone can detect temperature changes.

sentence: 他在民航公司工作了十年。
pinyin: Tā zài mínháng gōngsī gōngzuòle shí nián.
english: He has worked at a civil aviation company for ten years.

meaning: 1. to pronounce a sentence (after a verdict in a court of law)
sentence: 法院今天上午正式宣判了结果。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn jīntiān shàngwǔ zhèngshì xuānpànle jiéguǒ.
english: The court officially delivered its verdict this morning.

meaning: 1. mind; 2. state of mind; 3. attention; 4. (Chinese medicine) psychic
sentence: 考试前他心神不定，睡不着觉。
pinyin: Kǎoshì qián tā xīnshén bùdìng, shuì bu zháo jiào.
english: Before the exam he was unsettled in mind and couldn't sleep.

meaning: 1. to contract out; 2. to run into problems
sentence: 活动策划出包了，现场一片混乱。
pinyin: Huódòng cèhuà chū bāo le, xiànchǎng yīpiàn hùnluàn.
english: The event planning ran into problems and the venue was chaotic.

sentence: 这条管道负责向全区供水。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo guǎndào fùzé xiàng quán qū gōngshuǐ.
english: This pipeline is responsible for supplying water to the entire district.

meaning: 1. traffic police; 2. abbr. to 交警
sentence: 路口的交通警察正在指挥车流。
pinyin: Lùkǒu de jiāotōng jǐngchá zhèngzài zhǐhuī chēliú.
english: The traffic police at the intersection are directing the traffic.

sentence: 她每天早上打坐二十分钟来放松身心。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang dǎzuò èrshí fēnzhōng lái fàngsōng shēnxīn.
english: She meditates for twenty minutes every morning to relax body and mind.

sentence: 计划生育政策在中国实行了几十年。
pinyin: Jìhuà shēngyù zhèngcè zài Zhōngguó shíxíng le jǐ shí nián.
english: The family planning policy was implemented in China for several decades.

meaning: to come by; to obtain through some means
sentence: 这份工作是他努力得来的。
pinyin: Zhè fèn gōngzuò shì tā nǔlì délái de.
english: He earned this job through his own hard work.

meaning: web feed; news feed; syndicated feed
sentence: 记者拒绝透露消息来源。
pinyin: Jìzhě jùjué tòulù xiāoxi láiyuán.
english: The journalist refused to reveal the source of the information.

sentence: 这位老师做事很有原则性，从不徇私。
pinyin: Zhè wèi lǎoshī zuòshì hěn yǒu yuánzé xìng, cóng bù xùnsī.
english: This teacher is very principled and never shows favoritism.

sentence: 这条街是全市的商贸中心。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo jiē shì quán shì de shāngmào zhōngxīn.
english: This street is the trade and commerce hub of the entire city.

sentence: 分析师认为这支股票的基本面不错。
pinyin: Fēnxī shī rènwéi zhè zhī gǔpiào de jīběnmiàn bùcuò.
english: Analysts believe the fundamentals of this stock are solid.

sentence: 孩子们看到小丑表演都笑了。
pinyin: Háizimen kàndào xiǎochǒu biǎoyǎn dōu xiàole.
english: The children all laughed when they saw the clown perform.

sentence: 这次展览由市文化局承办。
pinyin: Zhè cì zhǎnlǎn yóu shì wénhuàjú chéngbàn.
english: This exhibition is organized by the city's cultural bureau.

meaning: 1. to contract (an illness); 2. to be afflicted with; 3. to suffer fro
sentence: 他从小患有哮喘，冬天比较难受。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo huànyǒu xiāochuǎn, dōngtiān bǐjiào nánshòu.
english: He has suffered from asthma since childhood and has a hard time in winter.

meaning: 1. abbr. for 體格檢查|体格检查[tǐ gé jiǎn chá]
sentence: 公司每年安排员工去体检一次。
pinyin: Gōngsī měi nián ānpái yuángōng qù tǐ jiǎn yī cì.
english: The company arranges for employees to have a physical check-up once a year.

sentence: 现代人的生活已经离不开手机了。
pinyin: Xiàndài rén de shēnghuó yǐjīng lí bù kāi shǒujī le.
english: Modern people's lives are now inseparable from their smartphones.

sentence: 他总是夸大自己的经历。
pinyin: Tā zǒng shì kuā dà zì jǐ de jīng lì.
english: He always exaggerates his own experiences.

sentence: 今天风力很强，适合放风筝。
pinyin: Jīntiān fēnglì hěn qiáng, shìhé fàng fēngzheng.
english: The wind force is very strong today — perfect for flying a kite.

meaning: 1. to retire; 2. to leave office; 3. to quit a job
sentence: 她上个月提交了离职申请。
pinyin: Tā shàng ge yuè tíjiāo le lízhí shēnqǐng.
english: She submitted her resignation last month.

sentence: 科学家测定了这块骨头的年龄。
pinyin: Kē xué jiā cè dìng le zhè kuài gǔ tou de nián líng.
english: Scientists determined the age of this bone.

sentence: 秋季天气凉爽，适合去爬山。
pinyin: Qiūjì tiānqì liángshuǎng, shìhé qù páshān.
english: The weather in autumn is cool and refreshing, perfect for hiking.

sentence: 那个年代农村里文盲很多。
pinyin: Nà ge niándài nóngcūn lǐ wénmáng hěn duō.
english: In that era there were many illiterate people in the countryside.

sentence: 他们因为合同问题打了一场官司。
pinyin: Tāmen yīnwèi hétong wèntí dǎle yī chǎng guānsī.
english: They had a lawsuit over a contract dispute.

meaning: vehicle model (i.e. particular version of a car or motorcycle etc)
sentence: 这款车型在年轻人中很受欢迎。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chēxíng zài niánqīng rén zhōng hěn shòu huānyíng.
english: This vehicle model is very popular among young people.

meaning: 1. to rank; 2. to grade; 3. to classify; 4. rank; 5. grade; 6. classif
sentence: 这部电影被分级为适合成人观看。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng bèi fēnjí wéi shìhé chéngrén guānkàn.
english: This movie was classified as suitable for adult viewers.

meaning: 1. to study the Confucian classics; 2. to read scriptures or canonical
sentence: 爷爷每天清晨都会读经半小时。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān qīngchén dōu huì dújīng bàn xiǎoshí.
english: Grandpa reads scriptures for half an hour every morning.

meaning: 1. to accuse of misconduct (in official task); 2. to impeach
sentence: 议会对该官员提出了弹劾动议。
pinyin: Yìhuì duì gāi guānyuán tíchūle tánhé dòngyì.
english: The parliament filed an impeachment motion against the official.

sentence: 冰是水的固体形态。
pinyin: Bīng shì shuǐ de gùtǐ xíngtài.
english: Ice is the solid form of water.

sentence: 这座矿山已经开采了五十多年。
pinyin: Zhè zuò kuàngshān yǐjīng kāicǎile wǔshí duō nián.
english: This mine has been in operation for over fifty years.

meaning: 1. big gun; 2. cannon; 3. artillery; 4. one who talks big; 5. trad. fo
sentence: 博物馆里展示着一门古老的大炮。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnshì zhe yī mén gǔlǎo de dàpào.
english: An ancient cannon is on display in the museum.

sentence: 超市在车站以东两百米处。
pinyin: Chāoshì zài chēzhàn yǐdōng liǎng bǎi mǐ chù.
english: The supermarket is two hundred meters to the east of the station.
